creator: dominique.goncalves@gmail.com
text:
New Port for p5-Ogg-Vorbis-Header-PurePerl

An object-oriented interface to Ogg Vorbis information and comment fields,
implemented entirely in Perl. Intended to be a drop in replacement for Ogg::Vobis::Header.

There is already p5-Ogg-Vorbis-Header in Ports Collection but this module is needed for gcstar.
A PR for gcstar will be send soon.

Fix: http://djdomics.free.fr/FreeBSD/gnome/patches/p5-Ogg-Vorbis-Header-PurePerl.shar

Patch attached with submission follows:
